name: awf-skill
description: Use the AWF (Agentic Workflow Firewall) to run commands with network isolation and domain whitelisting.
intent_triggers: use the awf skill agent skill
run a workflow for awf skill

幫我啟用 awf skill 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 awf skill
